description:
# Open question

ID generation scheme. Default: `bl-XXXX`, random 4-char suffix.

- Configurable via `id_scheme` in `config/balls.yaml`: `{ prefix, length, alphabet, generator }`.
- Plugin-assigned IDs (bl-284c): a `new/pre/` plugin assigns an id by `git mv`-ing the staged `tasks/<provisional>.md` + editing frontmatter IN THE WORKTREE — NOT via a return value (§7 has no return channel). balls re-reads the tree for the final id.
- Collision handling: before committing, balls checks for an existing ball with the same id; collision → abort with a clear error (caller/plugin retries).
- ID validation: must be a filename-safe path component — define the exact regex (alphanumeric + `-_`; decide on `/`, since ids index file paths).
- Generator alternatives: timestamp, sequential counter (needs state — awkward), uuid (verbose). Random is the default; offer config hooks for the others.
title: Topic: ID generation scheme
